tasks.label: Smoke Generator Packs (Auth)
tasks.command:
cd /Users/jcacosta/Documents/core-topo-gen && set -e && rm -f /tmp/cg_cookie_pack.txt /tmp/cg_pack.zip /tmp/cg_pack_dl.zip /tmp/cg_pack_export_all.zip /tmp/cg_pack_id.txt /tmp/cg_fg.json && /Users/jcacosta/Documents/core-topo-gen/.venv312/bin/python - <<'PY'
import zipfile, shutil
from pathlib import Path
base = Path('/tmp/cg_pack_src')
zip_path = Path('/tmp/cg_pack.zip')
shutil.rmtree(base, ignore_errors=True)
zip_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)

gen_dir = base / 'flag_generators' / 'smoke_test_gen'
gen_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(gen_dir / 'manifest.yaml').write_text(
    'manifest_version: 1\n'
    'id: smoke-test-gen\n'
    'kind: flag-generator\n'
    'name: Smoke Test Generator\n'
    'runtime:\n'
    '  type: docker-compose\n'
    '  compose_file: docker-compose.yml\n'
    '  service: generator\n',
    encoding='utf-8',
)
(gen_dir / 'docker-compose.yml').write_text(
    'version: "3.8"\n'
    'services:\n'
    '  generator:\n'
    '    image: alpine:3.19\n'
    '    command: ["sh", "-lc", "echo smoke"]\n',
    encoding='utf-8',
)
(gen_dir / 'run.py').write_text('print("smoke")\n', encoding='utf-8')

with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, 'w', compression=zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as z:
    for p in base.rglob('*'):
        if p.is_file():
            z.write(p, p.relative_to(base))
print(zip_path)
PY

curl -sS -c /tmp/cg_cookie_pack.txt -o /dev/null -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9090/login -d 'username=coreadmin' -d 'password=coreadmin'

curl -sS -b /tmp/cg_cookie_pack.txt -c /tmp/cg_cookie_pack.txt -o /dev/null -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9090/generator_packs/upload -F zip_file=@/tmp/cg_pack.zip

/Users/jcacosta/Documents/core-topo-gen/.venv312/bin/python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
state_path = Path('outputs/installed_generators/_packs_state.json')
data = json.loads(state_path.read_text('utf-8')) if state_path.exists() else {}
packs = [p for p in (data.get('packs') or []) if isinstance(p, dict)]
packs.sort(key=lambda p: p.get('installed_at') or '')
print((packs[-1].get('id') if packs else '') or '')
PY > /tmp/cg_pack_id.txt
PACK_ID=$(cat /tmp/cg_pack_id.txt | tr -d '\n' | tr -d '\r')
echo "PACK_ID=$PACK_ID"
if [ -z "$PACK_ID" ]; then echo 'ERROR: no pack id found' && exit 2; fi

curl -sS -b /tmp/cg_cookie_pack.txt -o /tmp/cg_fg.json http://127.0.0.1:9090/flag_generators_data
/Users/jcacosta/Documents/core-topo-gen/.venv312/bin/python - <<'PY'
import json
obj=json.load(open('/tmp/cg_fg.json','r',encoding='utf-8'))
gens=obj.get('generators') or []
ids=set((g.get('id') or '') for g in gens if isinstance(g,dict))
print('has_smoke_test_gen=', 'smoke-test-gen' in ids)
assert 'smoke-test-gen' in ids
PY

curl -sS -b /tmp/cg_cookie_pack.txt -o /tmp/cg_pack_dl.zip http://127.0.0.1:9090/generator_packs/download/$PACK_ID
/Users/jcacosta/Documents/core-topo-gen/.venv312/bin/python - <<'PY'
import zipfile
z=zipfile.ZipFile('/tmp/cg_pack_dl.zip','r')
names=set(z.namelist())
assert any(n.endswith('manifest.yaml') for n in names), sorted(list(names))[:20]
assert any(n.endswith('docker-compose.yml') for n in names), sorted(list(names))[:20]
print('download_zip_ok=1')
PY

curl -sS -b /tmp/cg_cookie_pack.txt -o /tmp/cg_pack_export_all.zip http://127.0.0.1:9090/generator_packs/export_all
/Users/jcacosta/Documents/core-topo-gen/.venv312/bin/python - <<'PY'
import zipfile
z=zipfile.ZipFile('/tmp/cg_pack_export_all.zip','r')
names=z.namelist()
assert any(n.startswith('packs/') and n.endswith('.zip') for n in names), names
print('export_all_ok=1')
PY

curl -sS -b /tmp/cg_cookie_pack.txt -o /dev/null -X POST http://127.0.0.1:9090/generator_packs/delete/$PACK_ID

/Users/jcacosta/Documents/core-topo-gen/.venv312/bin/python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
pack_id = open('/tmp/cg_pack_id.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read().strip()
state_path = Path('outputs/installed_generators/_packs_state.json')
data = json.loads(state_path.read_text('utf-8')) if state_path.exists() else {}
packs = [p for p in (data.get('packs') or []) if isinstance(p, dict)]
assert all((p.get('id') or '') != pack_id for p in packs)
print('uninstall_state_ok=1')
PY
